name: CMP_MKT_VND_OTHER_LEVEL_VL
query: SELECT B.OTHER_LEVEL_ID, B.OTHER_LEVEL_SEQ_NUM, B.OTHER_LEVEL_CODE, T.OTHER_LEVEL_NAME, T.OTHER_LEVEL_DESCR, T.DESCRIPTION, B.VENDOR_ID, B.STATUS, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM CMP_MKT_VND_OTHER_LEVEL_B B, CMP_MKT_VND_OTHER_LEVEL_TL T WHERE B.OTHER_LEVEL_ID = T.OTHER_LEVEL_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') AND B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = T.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
